channel.title: Posts on blog.guba.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on blog.guba.dev

item.title: Hello World
item.description: First post. Setting up a blog mostly so I have somewhere to dump things I figure out. I’m Patrick, 3rd year CS student at University of Groningen. At the moment I’m preoccupied with my wellbeing. I recently started going to the gym and eating healthier. I really enjoy going on long walks or long bike rides. I also have a plan to complete a HYROX race by summer 2027, and I’m looking for a partner for that.
